THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRIZ, ATAULFO $12,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,000.00, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS. NO ATTORNEY FEES AWARDED.
